meta.title: Forget Elevenlabs! This Free AI Text To Speech Voice Generator is Better - Minimax Audio
meta.description:
Forget Elevenlabs! This Free AI Text To Speech Voice Generator is Better
Try MiniMax Audio for Free: https://www.minimax.io/audio

In this video I show you the best elevenlabs alternative.  Minimax Audio is a free ai voice generator that can generate text to speech with high quality voices. I will walk you through how to use Minimax audio and give you 3 different examples of how you can use these ai voices.

MiniMax Audio supports 17+ languages with 4000 free daily credits.

#MiniMax #MiniMaxAudio #ai #texttospeech #voicecloning

Chapters
00:00 Intro to Minimax Audio
01:30 Using AI Voice for Faceless YouTube Channels
03:52 Creating Voiceovers for Motivational Videos
05:35 Generating AI Voices for ASMR Content
08:26 How to Clone Your Own Voice
09:30 MiniMax Audio pricing

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.
